module:
Chunking strategies for text processing.

This package provides various strategies for chunking text content
into smaller pieces that fit within embedding model token limits.

register_chunking_strategy.docstring: Decorator to register a chunking strategy.

get_chunking_strategy.docstring: Get a chunking strategy by name or enum.

get_cached_strategy.docstring: Get a cached chunking strategy by name or enum.

create_for_content_type.docstring: Create appropriate chunking strategy for a content type.
